taskDescription: Complete the crossword puzzle on thoracic cage anatomy.

words.clue: Broad upper part of the sternum, articulating with the clavicles
Small pointed projection at the lower end of the sternum
The angle where manubrium meets the body, named after a French physician
True ribs 1-7 attach directly to the sternum via costal ___
Ribs 11 and 12 are called ___ ribs because they have no anterior attachment
The central compartment of the thorax between the two pleural cavities
The movement of upper ribs during inspiration, like a pump handle
The neurovascular bundle runs in the costal groove on the ___ border of each rib
The membrane connecting adjacent intercostal spaces internally
